scripts.title: Moderna Soars This Week
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped almost nineteen percent this week, making it a standout.

beats.vo: Moderna surged almost nineteen percent this week, closing near eighty dollars a share.
beats.caption: Moderna +18.57%

beats.vo: The company saw renewed investor interest after market commentator Jim Cramer expressed liking his position in the stock for the first time in ages.
beats.caption: Cramer likes MRNA

beats.vo: This came as oil prices dipped and the market saw a rotation into certain stocks ahead of the second quarter earnings season.
beats.caption: Market rotation, oil dips

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna led the pack this week with a significant jump. Here's why. For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Weekly Market Movers: AI and Crypto
scripts.hook: Palantir shares rose just over fourteen percent this week.

beats.vo: Palantir shares rose just over fourteen percent this week after CEO Alex Karp voiced concerns that enterprise customers are wary of frontier AI companies fearing for their intellectual property.
beats.caption: Palantir +14.50%

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Coinbase climbed over eleven percent as Bitcoin traded above sixty-two thousand dollars, fueled by renewed momentum for US cryptocurrency legislation.
beats.caption: Coinbase +11.02%

beats.vo: On the downside, Micron fell nearly fourteen percent. This came as Wall Street veterans flagged the chip maker's sell-off as a potential warning sign for the broader AI sector.
beats.caption: Micron -13.84%

beats.vo: And Super Micro Computer dropped over eleven percent, moving with the broader semiconductor sector this week.
beats.caption: Super Micro -11.13%

scripts.cta: What caught your eye this week?
scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: A look at this week's notable stock moves, from Palantir's AI insights to Micron's dip. For information only — not financial advice.
